sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Matrimonial Causes Short title
sections.body:
(Amendment) Act, 2024, and shall be read as one with the
Matrimonial Causes Act, 2007, in this Act referred to as the principal Act No. 20
of 2007
Act.

sections.title: Section 2(1) is amended by the insertion of the following
sections.body:
Amendment
new definition in the appropriate place: of section 2
“child” has the meaning assigned to the word in the Cap. 1
Constitution;.

sections.title: Section 27(1)(a) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
sections.body:
of section 27
deletion of paragraph (ii) and the substitution therefor of the following:
(ii) either party to the marriage was a child at the time the
marriage was celebrated;.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
72
